== Notes for [[Item:Q118527|Q118527]] ==

Ou Alda, Senhora de Seixezelo.

-----------

*http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SPANISH%20NOBILITY%20LATER%20MEDIEVAL.htm#GilVasquezSoverosadiedbefore1222A

d) ALDARA Vásquez . The Nobiliario of Pedro Conde de Barcelos names "D. Gil Vazquez de Soverosa, D. Martin, D. Elvira Vazquez, D. Aldara Vazquez" as the children of "D. Vasco Fernandez" and his wife "D. Teresa Gonçalez de Sousa", adding that Aldara was "monja en S. Tirso"[2644].

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
